title: AI Agents Hackathon (Online)
description: Build autonomous AI agents and agentic workflows. Open to all developers.

description: Build night for developers using Cursor, Claude Code and Codex. Ship live.

title: MCP Builders Night
description: Deep dive into the Model Context Protocol ecosystem. Build MCP servers, connect agents to tools.

description: Weekend buildathon focused on multi-agent systems, agent frameworks and tool use.

description: Open source contributors demo their agent frameworks. LangGraph, CrewAI and more.

description: Hands-on workshop on evals, RLHF and post-training data pipelines for LLMs.

description: Talks on GPU serving, inference optimization and vector databases for production AI infra.

title: Intro to ChatGPT for Marketers
description: Beginner friendly webinar on using ChatGPT for marketing and content creation. No coding.
